title: clone integrity gate plan review 2

callout.p: 结论：二轮方案还需要再修一处 P1 后才能实现。review-1 的两个 blocker 已方向性关闭，但 direct mention probe 的生产发送路径仍未闭合。

ul.li: Code seams: event-dispatcher.ts, cli.ts, client.ts, observed-bots-store.ts, clone-scope-provisioning.ts, subtask-store.ts

h2: Direct @ probe still lacks a valid production sending path
p: The v2 plan records direct ack only in the group user-message route, then proposes sending a real mention from the CEO/owner app using <at user_id="{cloneOpenId}">name</at> [[direct-ack:...]].

tr.td: If the CEO bot/app sends the probe via sendMessage(), the clone daemon receives sender_type='app'/'bot', not a user message. Current event-dispatcher.ts handles that in the foreign-bot branch and returns before the user-message route.
Either send through a real user/owner identity path, or add the direct-ack hook to the bot-originated mention branch after peer/oncall vetting.
cloneOpenId from /bot/v3/info / bots-info.json is the clone self-view open_id. Existing botmux send avoids this fallback because outbound mentions need the target ID in the sender app's scope.
Resolve the mention target from sender-scoped cross-ref or an equivalent Lark mention/chat-member source. If unavailable, mark direct_mention=unknown and block.
A unit test whose message.mentions contains the clone self open_id proves only receiver parsing, not the real sender app's event view.
Add tests for bot-sent probe routing and wrong-scope/no-mentions failure.

ul.li: Decide the real probe sender: user/owner path vs bot-sent path.
Use sender-scoped open_id for outbound mention; do not fall back to bots-info.botOpenId.
If sender-scoped ID is unavailable, block as unknown with remediation such as /introduce, botmux bots list, or a verified chat-member/mention source.
Cover both sender branch and open_id scope in tests.
unknown is now explicitly not green.
Strict delivery scope gate is separated from the existing fail-open subgroup provisioning gate.
Description source and no-post-scan-self-heal semantics are explicit.
Preheat failure no longer proceeds to lateKickoff() / joined in the proposed flow.
Restart remediation now has a clone-only hook and an authorization boundary.

callout.p: If the direct probe is only a receipt proof, define whether probe-only messages should be swallowed after ack. Otherwise a token-stripped empty/body-only probe can create or resume a CLI session unnecessarily.

ul.li: Reviewer made docs-only review artifacts; no implementation code was changed.
